  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Server-side logging</a>

  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Common
  issues</a>

  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Working directory</a>

- <a href="debugging.html#debugging-in-claude-desktop"

  in Claude Desktop</a>

  style="padding-left:1rem">Checking server status</a>
- <a href="debugging.html#viewing-logs"

class="relative grow box-border flex-col w-full mx-auto px-1 lg:pl-[23.7rem] lg:-ml-12 xl:w-[calc(100%-28rem)]">

<div class="mt-0.5 space-y-2.5">

<div class="eyebrow h-5 text-primary dark:text-primary-light text-sm font-semibold">

Developer tools

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

A comprehensive guide to debugging Model Context Protocol (MCP)
integrations

</div>

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Debugging" page-href="/docs/tools/debugging">

<span data-as="p">Effective debugging is essential when developing MCP
servers or integrating them with applications. This guide covers the
debugging tools and approaches available in the MCP ecosystem.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#debugging-tools-overview"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Debugging tools overview</span>

<span data-as="p">MCP provides several tools for debugging at different
levels:</span>

1.  **<a href="inspector.html" class="link">MCP Inspector</a>**:
    interactive, transport-agnostic testing UI. Connect to stdio or
    Streamable HTTP servers, invoke
    <a href="../../specification/latest/server/tools.html"
    class="link">tools</a>,
    <a href="../../specification/latest/server/prompts.html"
    class="link">prompts</a>, and
    <a href="../../specification/latest/server/resources.html"
    class="link">resources</a>, and watch the notification stream. This
    should be your first stop.
2.  **Server logging**: structured logs to stderr (stdio transport) or
    via <a
    href="../../specification/latest/server/utilities/logging.html#log-message-notifications"
    class="link"><code>notifications/message</code></a> (all
    transports).
3.  **Client developer tools**: most MCP clients expose logs and
    connection state. See
    <a href="debugging.html#debugging-in-claude-desktop"
    class="link">Debugging in Claude Desktop</a> below for one example,
    or consult your client’s documentation.

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#implementing-logging"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Implementing logging</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#server-side-logging"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Server-side logging</span>

<span data-as="p">When building a server that uses the local
<a href="../../specification/latest/basic/transports.html#stdio"
class="link">stdio transport</a>, all messages logged to stderr
(standard error) will be captured by the host application
automatically.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="warning">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Local MCP servers should not log messages to stdout
(standard out), as this will interfere with protocol operation.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">For servers using the <a
href="../../specification/latest/basic/transports.html#streamable-http"
class="link">Streamable HTTP transport</a>, stderr is not captured by
the client. Use the log message notifications below, your own
server-side log aggregation, or standard HTTP tooling (curl, browser
DevTools Network panel) to inspect requests, <a
href="../../specification/latest/basic/transports.html#session-management"
class="link"><code>Mcp-Session-Id</code> headers</a>, and SSE
streams.</span> <span data-as="p">For all
<a href="../../specification/latest/basic/transports.html"
class="link">transports</a>, you can also provide logging to the client
by sending a log message notification:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Python

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

TypeScript

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_aldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_aldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
@server.tool()
async def my_tool(ctx: Context) -> str:
    await ctx.session.send_log_message(
        level="info",
        data="Server started successfully",
    )
    return "done"
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_aldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_aldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">MCP defines eight <a
href="../../specification/latest/server/utilities/logging.html#log-levels"
class="link">RFC 5424 severity levels</a> (`debug` through `emergency`).
Clients can adjust the minimum level at runtime via the <a
href="../../specification/latest/server/utilities/logging.html#setting-log-level"
class="link"><code>logging/setLevel</code></a> request.</span>
<span data-as="p">Important events to log:</span>

- Initialization steps
- Resource access
- Tool execution
- Error conditions
- Performance metrics

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#common-issues"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Common issues</span>

<span data-as="p">The examples below use Claude Desktop’s
<a href="../develop/connect-local-servers.html"
class="link"><code>claude_desktop_config.json</code></a>; the same
principles apply to any stdio-based MCP client.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#working-directory"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Working directory</span>

<span data-as="p">When an MCP client launches a stdio server:</span>

- The working directory for servers launched via the client’s config may
  be undefined (like `/` on macOS) since the client could be started
  from anywhere
- Always use absolute paths in your configuration and `.env` files to
  ensure reliable operation
- For testing servers directly via command line, the working directory
  will be where you run the command

<span data-as="p">For example in `claude_desktop_config.json`,
use:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="12" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "filesystem": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": [
        "-y",
        "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem",
        "/Users/username/data"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Instead of relative paths like `./data`</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#environment-variables"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Environment variables</span>

<span data-as="p">MCP servers launched over stdio inherit only a limited
subset of environment variables automatically (the exact set is
platform-dependent).</span> <span data-as="p">To override the default
variables or provide your own, you can specify an `env` key in
`claude_desktop_config.json`:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="10" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "myserver": {
      "command": "mcp-server-myapp",
      "env": {
        "MYAPP_API_KEY": "some_key"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#server-initialization"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Server initialization</span>

<span data-as="p">Common initialization problems:</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">**Path Issues**</span>
    - Incorrect server executable path
    - Missing required files
    - Permission problems
    - Try using an absolute path for `command`
2.  <span data-as="p">**Configuration Errors**</span>
    - Invalid JSON syntax
    - Missing required fields
    - Type mismatches
3.  <span data-as="p">**Environment Problems**</span>
    - Missing environment variables
    - Incorrect variable values
    - Permission restrictions

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#connection-problems"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Connection problems</span>

<span data-as="p">When servers fail to connect:</span>

1.  Check client logs
2.  Verify server process is running
3.  Test standalone with
    <a href="inspector.html" class="link">Inspector</a>
4.  Verify <a
    href="../../specification/latest/basic/lifecycle.html#version-negotiation"
    class="link">protocol compatibility</a>
5.  Check <a
    href="../../specification/latest/basic/lifecycle.html#capability-negotiation"
    class="link">capability negotiation</a>: error
    <a href="../../specification/latest/basic/lifecycle.html#error-handling"
    class="link"><code>-32602</code></a> is the standard JSON-RPC
    “Invalid params” code and is returned in many contexts. One common
    cause is a server sending
    <a href="../../specification/latest/client/sampling.html"
    class="link">sampling</a> or
    <a href="../../specification/latest/client/elicitation.html"
    class="link">elicitation</a> requests to a client that hasn’t
    declared that capability. Inspect the
    <a href="../../specification/latest/basic/lifecycle.html#initialization"
    class="link"><code>initialize</code> exchange</a> to verify both
    sides declared what you expect

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#debugging-in-claude-desktop"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Debugging in Claude Desktop</span>

<span data-as="p">Claude Desktop is
<a href="../../clients.html" class="link">one of many MCP clients</a>.
It is available on macOS and Windows.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#checking-server-status"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Click the “Add files, connectors, and more” plus icon
in the chat input, then hover over the **Connectors** menu to see
connected servers and available tools.</span>
<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#viewing-logs"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

<span class="cursor-pointer">Viewing logs</span>

<span data-as="p">Log files are written to:</span>

- macOS: `~/Library/Logs/Claude`
- Windows: `%APPDATA%\Claude\logs`

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_18ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_18ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
tail -n 20 -F ~/Library/Logs/Claude/mcp*.log
```

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

<span data-as="p">The logs capture:</span>

- Server connection events
- Configuration issues
- Runtime errors
- Message exchanges

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#using-chrome-devtools"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Using Chrome DevTools</span>

<span data-as="p">Access Chrome’s developer tools inside Claude Desktop
to investigate client-side errors:</span>

1.  Create a `developer_settings.json` file with `allowDevTools` set to
    true:

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_1eldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1eldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
echo '{"allowDevTools": true}' > ~/Library/Application\ Support/Claude/developer_settings.json
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_1eldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1eldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

2.  Open DevTools: `Command-Option-I` (macOS) or `Ctrl+Alt+I` (Windows)

<span data-as="p">Note: You’ll see two DevTools windows:</span>

- Main content window
- App title bar window

<span data-as="p">Use the Console panel to inspect client-side
errors.</span> <span data-as="p">Use the Network panel to
inspect:</span>

- Message payloads
- Connection timing

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#debugging-workflow"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Debugging workflow</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#development-cycle"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Development cycle</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">Initial Development</span>
    - Use <a href="inspector.html" class="link">Inspector</a> for basic
      testing
    - Implement core functionality
    - Add logging points
2.  <span data-as="p">Integration Testing</span>
    - Test in your target MCP client
    - Monitor logs
    - Check error handling

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#testing-changes"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Testing changes</span>

<span data-as="p">To test changes efficiently:</span>

- **Configuration changes**: Restart the MCP client
- **Server code changes**: Restart the client (for Claude Desktop, fully
  quit and reopen; closing the window is not enough)
- **Quick iteration**: Use
  <a href="inspector.html" class="link">Inspector</a> during development

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#best-practices"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best practices</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#logging-strategy"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Logging strategy</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">**Structured Logging**</span>
    - Use consistent formats
    - Include context
    - Add timestamps
    - Track request IDs
2.  <span data-as="p">**Error Handling**</span>
    - Log stack traces
    - Include error context
    - Track error patterns
    - Monitor recovery
3.  <span data-as="p">**Performance Tracking**</span>
    - Log operation timing
    - Monitor resource usage
    - Track message sizes
    - Measure latency

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#security-considerations"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Security considerations</span>

<span data-as="p">When debugging:</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">**Sensitive Data**</span>
    - Sanitize logs
    - Protect credentials
    - Mask personal information
2.  <span data-as="p">**Access Control**</span>
    - Verify permissions
    - Check authentication
    - Monitor access patterns

<span data-as="p">For a full treatment of MCP attack vectors and
mitigations, see
<a href="../tutorials/security/security_best_practices.html"
class="link">Security Best Practices</a>.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="debugging.html#getting-help"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Getting help</span>

<span data-as="p">When encountering issues:</span>

1.  <span data-as="p">**First Steps**</span>
    - Check server logs
    - Test with <a href="inspector.html" class="link">Inspector</a>
    - Review configuration
    - Verify environment
2.  <span data-as="p">**Support Channels**</span>
    - <a
      href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/issues"
      class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">GitHub issues</a>
    - <a
      href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/discussions"
      class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">GitHub discussions</a>
3.  <span data-as="p">**Providing Information**</span>
    - Log excerpts
    - Configuration files
    - Steps to reproduce
    - Environment details

##
